body:
This PR:
 - Reverts #700 (cc @szy21)
 - Upgrades the (compatible dependencies) dependencies
 - Runs a vanilla (low resolution perf target) in the test env to exercise our the latest deps (closes #703)
title: Correct compats, test latest versions

body: Our GHA CI is still breaking for some strange reason. This PR attempts to fix it and exercise our test env in a buildkite job, to close #705.
title: Exercise test env in buildkite job
